niche: Academic assignment help for Occupational Therapy students
source_context: Academic assignment help and tutoring service for students pursuing Occupational Therapy undergraduate (BSc), postgraduate (MSc/PgDip), and doctoral (OTD) degrees. Also serves OTA (Occupational Therapy Assistant) programme students. Monetises through paid assignment help, essay writing, coursework support, case study writing, reflective journals, literature reviews, and exam/viva preparation.
target_audience: International OT students studying in UK, USA, Australia, Canada
Students on practice placement struggling with reflective journals
